payload.title: New at WRITER: Brand systems built for an AI era
payload.fact: Writer launched brand systems featuring unified voice profiles, terminology lists, style guides, connected workflows, and shared Projects for teams.
supporting_evidence: Scale brand consistency in WRITER with unified voice profiles, terminology lists, style guides, connected workflows, and shared Projects for every team

payload.title: Use this agent to optimize and update your blog SEO…daily
payload.fact: Writer launched five AI agents that use live Semrush data to analyze, plan, create, publish SEO-optimized blog content, and review performance data for improvements.
supporting_evidence: These five agents uses live Semrush data to analyze, plan, create, and publish SEO optimized blog content, then review performance data to improve the next run

payload.title: Personalized AI might be taking your side over the truth
payload.fact: Writer's research found that personalized AI models can lose up to 71% accuracy in finance and healthcare sectors.
supporting_evidence: WRITER’s research reveals that personalised AI models can lose up to 71% accuracy in finance and healthcare

payload.title: Bankers mostly skipped SaaS. They’re all in on AI now.
payload.fact: Bankers are adopting Agentic AI to assist with prospecting, preparation, and pitching new business.
supporting_evidence: Bankers are getting a lift from Agentic AI

payload.title: Automate your podcast production without losing your voice
payload.fact: Writer launched AI agents to automate podcast production tasks including interview preparation, show notes, and social promotion.
supporting_evidence: Learn how to automate your podcast production, from interview prep to show notes to social promotion, using AI agents
